title: Lowe's: Hold Onto This Long-Term Compounder
text: The exact definition of 'Compounder' is oft-debated, but in our view it means a stock that can increase an investment's value at above average rates for long periods of time. Compounder businesses increase the value of their stock by increasing demand for shares while also reducing the supply of them. Lowe's is a compounder due to its consistent revenue and net income growth, as well as its significant reduction in outstanding shares through stock buybacks.
